email_subject: Graza — the olive oil brand your customers are already searching for
email_body:
Hi [Buyer Name],

I'm reaching out about Graza — the olive oil brand that's generated more organic social buzz in the past two years than any other product in the category. If your customers haven't discovered it yet, they're about to.

Founded by Andrew Benin, Graza comes in a distinctive squeeze bottle that's as functional as it is photogenic. Here's what the data shows:

• 145K Instagram + 62K TikTok followers — driven by organic consumer love, not paid influencers
• 1,240 Amazon reviews at 4.5★ — strong repeat purchase rate
• Subscribe & Save activated — proven loyalty signal
• $6M raised — well-capitalized for regional retail push
• SRP $19.99 — strong gross margin for the olive oil set
• Already in Whole Foods nationally, plus Target and Williams-Sonoma

Graza fits perfectly in the Whole Foods olive oil set — it's premium without being precious, and the squeeze bottle format drives in-store trial. I've seen strong velocity data from comparable markets.

Would love to walk you through their regional velocity story. Are you available for 20 minutes this week?

Best,
[Your name]
Independent Food Broker | [Territory]

Founded by Andrew Benin, the brand has built 145K+ Instagram followers and strong DTC performance. At $19.99 SRP with Non-GMO certification, it delivers strong margins for specialty retailers.
